_comment: Product launch trailer — 60-90s. For books, plugins, courses, SaaS launches, digital products. Hook → Origin/problem → Reveal → Features → Proof → CTA with launch offer. Big cinematic energy.

brand.name: PRODUCT_NAME
brand.launchOffer: Founding members get LAUNCH_DISCOUNT off through LAUNCH_END_DATE

scenes.prompt: Cinematic black void with a single point of golden light beginning to pulse and glow at center. Slow camera push toward the light. Building anticipation, dramatic. No text or logos.
Visual metaphor for the problem PRODUCT solves — could be cluttered desk, frustrated user, broken process, abandoned project. Documentary realism, slight desaturation. No text or logos.
scenes.vo: Every NICHE_PROFESSIONAL has run into this problem. SPECIFIC_PAIN_POINT.

scenes.prompt: Time-lapse of empty hours passing — clock hands spinning, daylight fading, calendar pages flipping. Sense of wasted time, urgency building. No text or logos.
scenes.vo: What if you could skip all of that?

scenes._note: ffmpeg scale-up animation, logo small → fills screen, fire/light particles. Same technique as intro-trailer skill.

scenes.name: BETA_USER_NAME, ROLE
scenes.vo: Beta users say it's already changing how they work.

scenes.headline: PRODUCT_NAME — Launching LAUNCH_DATE
scenes.vo: Founding members get LAUNCH_DISCOUNT off. Visit PRODUCT dot com to claim your spot.
